_comment: Sellers we trust for price tracking + alerts. Amazon: match by merchant id, exact name, or (optionally) any name containing 'official'. AliExpress: trusted store ids/names (used once the affiliate API is live). Add sellers here as you vet them.

aliexpress._comment: Trusted if: store id/name allowlisted, name contains 'official', OR reputation passes (rating >= minRating% AND sales >= minSales). Tune the thresholds to taste.
